title: Privacy Policy
personalInfoBody: Account details (email) are handled by Supabase Auth. We do not store additional personal information.
encounterDataBody: Your notes are encrypted with AES-256 on the server before storage. Ratings and mood logs are stored in plaintext in the database. All data transmission is protected by HTTPS.
locationDataBody: We only access location when you explicitly enable "Location Tracking". You can choose "City Level" to reduce coordinate precision. Location data is never shared with third parties.
howWeUseDataBody: We do NOT sell your data. Data is used exclusively to:
useItem1: Provide your personal dashboard and "Year Overview"
useItem2: Sync records across your authorized devices via Supabase
dataStorageBody: Your data is stored in Supabase's secure cloud with Row-Level Security (RLS) ensuring only you can access your records. Sensitive notes are encrypted with AES-256, and all data transmission is protected by HTTPS.
thirdPartyServicesBody: We use Mapbox for footprint visualization. Mapbox receives anonymized coordinates to render your maps but does not link them to your identity.
contactQuestion: Questions about your privacy? Contact us at
